mapper.sql: id, plan_no, equipment_id, equipment_name, equipment_code, customer_name, plan_type, plan_date, status, assignee_name, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_maintenance_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_maintenance_plan ( plan_no, equipment_id, equipment_name, equipment_code, customer_name, plan_type, plan_date, status, assignee_name, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{planNo}, #{equipmentId}, #{equipmentName}, #{equipmentCode}, #{customerName}, #{planType}, #{planDate}, #{status}, #{assigneeName}, #{remark}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_maintenance_plan
update_time = NOW(), plan_no = #{planNo}, equipment_id = #{equipmentId}, equipment_name = #{equipmentName}, equipment_code = #{equipmentCode}, customer_name = #{customerName}, plan_type = #{planType}, plan_date = #{planDate}, status = #{status}, assignee_name = #{assigneeName}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_maintenance_plan SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
